ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "data_update_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the data source updates its data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source that provided the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset type */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data frequency */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Index name for the dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dataset */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading for the dataset */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation reading for the dataset */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading for the dataset */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES data_frequency ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES dataset_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dataset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the data frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data frequency */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the data frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_reviews_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
